description: Benchmark baseline for Ranvier Core CI regression testing
updated_by: rebaselined from CI run (P99=85ms, throughput=499 req/s)
notes: Baseline rebaselined from CI run: P99=85ms, P90=67ms, P50=52ms, throughput=499 req/s

Update baseline via: gh workflow run benchmark.yml -f update_baseline=true
